commands.review_summary:
Adds a GitHub CLI config-dir mismatch helper, wires a `GH_CONFIG_DIR` note into `openclaw doctor`, adds tests, updates the bundled GitHub skill docs, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. the linked Linux report gives a concrete `HOME` mismatch command and working `GH_CONFIG_DIR` workaround, and `gh help environment` confirms the config lookup chain. I did not run a live root-owned systemd gateway reproduction during this read-only pass.
